library.description: النواة الأساسية لـ SDL3: النوافذ، الإدخال، الأحداث، الصوت، والرسم الأساسي.

kind.description: استدعاءات تنفذ فعلاً، تغيّر حالة، أو تعيد نتيجة، أو تبني مورداً.

summary.purposeArabic: تستخدم هذه الدالة عندما تحتاج إلى إنشاء نافذة بالأبعاد والأعلام المحددة داخل التطبيق أو داخل مسار التنفيذ المرتبط بها.
summary.whyUseArabic: القيمة الحقيقية هنا هي الأثر التنفيذي الذي يحدثه الاستدعاء أو النتيجة التي يعيدها إلى التطبيق.
summary.carriedValueArabic: القيمة العملية لهذا الاستدعاء تظهر في ناتجه يعيد النافذة التي أُنشئت أو NULL عند الفشل؛ استخدم SDL_GetError لمعرفة السبب. وفي التغيير الذي يحدثه على المورد أو الحالة المرتبطة به.
summary.sourceDescription: Create a window with the specified dimensions and flags.

signature.raw: SDL_Window * SDL_CreateWindow(const char *title, int w, int h, SDL_WindowFlags flags);

parameters.name: title
parameters.originalDescription: the title of the window, in UTF-8 encoding.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.descriptionArabic: تمثل القيمة 0 أو علماً واحداً أو عدة أعلام من النوع SDL_WindowFlags مدموجة معاً.
parameters.originalDescription:
0, or one or more SDL_WindowFlags
OR'd together.

remarks:
The window size is a request and may be different than expected based
on the desktop layout and window manager policies. Your application
should be prepared to handle a window of any size.
flags may be any of the following OR'd together:

SDL_WINDOW_FULLSCREEN :
fullscreen window at desktop resolution

SDL_WINDOW_OPENGL :
window usable with an OpenGL context

SDL_WINDOW_HIDDEN :
window is not visible

SDL_WINDOW_BORDERLESS :
no window decoration

SDL_WINDOW_RESIZABLE :
window can be resized

SDL_WINDOW_MINIMIZED :
window is minimized

SDL_WINDOW_MAXIMIZED :
window is maximized

SDL_WINDOW_MOUSE_GRABBED :
window has grabbed mouse focus

SDL_WINDOW_INPUT_FOCUS :
window has input focus

SDL_WINDOW_MOUSE_FOCUS :
window has mouse focus

SDL_WINDOW_EXTERNAL :
window not created by SDL

SDL_WINDOW_MODAL :
window is modal

SDL_WINDOW_HIGH_PIXEL_DENSITY :
window uses high pixel density back buffer if possible

SDL_WINDOW_MOUSE_CAPTURE :
window has mouse captured (unrelated to MOUSE_GRABBED)

SDL_WINDOW_ALWAYS_ON_TOP :
window should always be above others

SDL_WINDOW_UTILITY :
window should be treated as a utility window, not showing in the task
bar and window list

SDL_WINDOW_TOOLTIP :
window should be treated as a tooltip and does not get mouse or keyboard
focus, requires a parent window

SDL_WINDOW_POPUP_MENU :
window should be treated as a popup menu, requires a parent window

SDL_WINDOW_KEYBOARD_GRABBED :
window has grabbed keyboard input

SDL_WINDOW_VULKAN :
window usable with a Vulkan instance

SDL_WINDOW_METAL :
window usable with a Metal instance

SDL_WINDOW_TRANSPARENT :
window with transparent buffer

SDL_WINDOW_NOT_FOCUSABLE :
window should not be focusable

The SDL_Window will be shown if SDL_WINDOW_HIDDEN is not set. If
hidden at creation time, SDL_ShowWindow () can be used to show it
later.

On Apple's macOS, you must set the
NSHighResolutionCapable Info.plist property to YES, otherwise you will
not receive a High-DPI OpenGL canvas.

The window pixel size may differ from its window coordinate size if
the window is on a high pixel density display. Use SDL_GetWindowSize () to query the
client area's size in window coordinates, and SDL_GetWindowSizeInPixels () or
 SDL_GetRenderOutputSize () to
query the drawable size in pixels. Note that the drawable size can vary
after the window is created and should be queried again if you get an SDL_EVENT_WINDOW_PIXEL_SIZE_CHANGED
event.

If the window is created with any of the SDL_WINDOW_OPENGL or SDL_WINDOW_VULKAN flags, then the
corresponding LoadLibrary function ( SDL_GL_LoadLibrary or SDL_Vulkan_LoadLibrary ) is called
and the corresponding UnloadLibrary function is called by SDL_DestroyWindow ().

If SDL_WINDOW_VULKAN is
specified and there isn't a working Vulkan driver, SDL_CreateWindow () will fail, because
 SDL_Vulkan_LoadLibrary () will
fail.

If SDL_WINDOW_METAL is specified
on an OS that does not support Metal, SDL_CreateWindow () will fail.

If you intend to use this window with an SDL_Renderer , you should use SDL_CreateWindowAndRenderer ()
instead of this function, to avoid window flicker.

On non-Apple devices, SDL requires you to either not link to the
Vulkan loader or link to a dynamic library version. This limitation may
be removed in a future version of SDL.
details.returns: يعيد النافذة التي أُنشئت أو NULL عند الفشل؛ استخدم SDL_GetError لمعرفة السبب.
details.threadSafety: يجب استدعاء هذه الدالة من الخيط الرئيسي فقط.
